description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a light blue exterior and white trim, featuring a prominent covered front porch supported by white columns and wooden steps leading up to the entry. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with a stone path and shrubbery. A unique feature is the large treehouse built around a mature tree in the backyard, enclosed by its own section of fencing. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several on each story, and the roof is a dark gray gable style. The backyard also includes a swing set and additional greenery, creating a family-friendly environment. The overall design blends traditional American suburban architecture with playful outdoor elements.
description: A two-story blue house with a covered front porch, white trim, and a backyard featuring a large treehouse and swing set, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house, the fenced yard, and the large treehouse in the backyard.
description_view_1: The front of the house is visible, showcasing the covered porch, main entry steps, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the proximity of the treehouse to the house and the continuous wooden fencing.
description_view_3: The backyard is prominent, with the treehouse, swing set, and landscaping clearly visible behind the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with white columns, wooden steps, and a central entry door
